title: Add crates.io publish CD workflow and exclude __pycache__ from crate

comments.author: m1
comments.content: Two changes: 1) Add !**/__pycache__/** negation to Cargo.toml include, 2) Create .github/workflows/publish.yml triggered on v* tags that runs CI then cargo publish

comments.author: m1
comments.content: Created .github/workflows/publish.yml. Triggers on v* tags, reuses CI workflow, verifies tag version matches Cargo.toml, then publishes with CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN secret. Cargo.toml __pycache__ exclusion was already applied.
